message:
feat(join): add bumpalo arena allocator path for join intermediate vectors

Introduce an arena-allocated join path using bumpalo to reduce
allocation pressure during large join operations, with automatic
fallback to the global allocator when the arena budget is exceeded.

- Add JoinExecutionOptions struct with use_arena flag and configurable
  arena_budget_bytes (default 256 MiB) to control allocation strategy
- Add join_series_with_options() and join_series_with_trace() entry
  points that accept execution options
- Split join implementation into two paths:
  - join_series_with_arena(): uses bumpalo::Bump for intermediate
    position vectors, avoiding per-vector heap allocations
  - join_series_with_global_allocator(): the original heap path,
    now with with_capacity pre-sizing for better allocation behavior
- Add estimate_output_rows() and estimate_intermediate_bytes() helpers
  for budget estimation before choosing allocation strategy
- Add three new tests: arena vs global allocator parity verification,
  budget-exceeded fallback behavior, and stability under many small
  operations

Workspace: add bumpalo 3.16 with collections feature.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
